what_it_does: This file is a generated surface specification for view A1 in area A, describing the empty/first-run Canvas screen, its platforms, represented concepts, status, associated journeys, ui:// address references, and build targets.
observations: Title is 'Canvas - empty / first-run' and status is 'planned'.
Home journey is J1, journeys list contains only J1, and cross_journeys is empty.
The 'represents' field lists EVT-now, CAN-compose, and NODE-types without defining them.
Addresses use a ui:// URI scheme covering activity, canvas, rail, tabbar, and toolbar scopes.
build_to names components, a design_lint command, and a tokens-to-CSS pipeline.
standouts: It maps a view to a concrete set of ui:// addresses rather than to component file paths.
build_to explicitly couples the spec to a lint gate and a token source.
The _what field records provenance and a rule: addresses were built to a given list and must not be invented.
conventions: Follows a JSON schema with id, area, title, platforms, represents, status, journeys, addresses, and build_to.
References external build artifacts (lint script and tokens file) by path/command.
concerns: Status is 'planned' while build_to already specifies concrete lint and token commands.
The 'represents' values are opaque without in-file definitions.
_what mentions a web (B3) that is not represented in the file's own cross_journeys or fields.
notes: This is the planned surface blueprint for the empty/first-run Canvas view, listing its UI addresses, components, and build pipeline.
questions: What exactly do EVT-now, CAN-compose, and NODE-types represent?
What is the B3 web referenced in _what and where is it defined?
How are the ui:// addresses validated against the 'never invent an address' rule?
What does the design_lint command check and what would cause it to fail?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it is a generated surface spec for view A1 that records addresses, journeys, and build instructions.
apparent_themes: Separation of surface blueprints from implementation components
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to establish a machine-readable blueprint that maps a user-facing view to stable UI addresses, journeys, and build artifacts so the empty canvas state can be implemented and validated consistently.
novelty: The use of ui:// URI addresses as the central referencing scheme for UI surfaces, plus an explicit provenance note forbidding invented addresses.
contribution: It contributes a concrete surface specification for the A1 empty canvas view, including its address map, component scope, and build constraints, which a fused system can use as one input for rendering and validation.
summary_for_embedding: A planned JSON surface specification for view A1 (Canvas - empty / first-run) in journey J1, listing platforms, represented concepts, ui:// addresses, components, and build-to instructions for lint and design tokens.
intention_for_embedding: To blueprint the empty/first-run canvas view as a reusable, address-referenced surface with explicit build and validation targets.
